summary: 47-commit collections-are-data refactor is sound: native dict/list value types own truthiness/equality/ordering through IBooleanResolvable/IEquatableValue/IOrderableValue; @schema:data marker replaces shape-sniff for Data recognition; CopyStructure deletion-tested at the list.add merge boundary. C# 4089/0 + plang 271 pass + 2 honest Skipped + 0 fail verified deterministic. Merge gate to signature-as-schema-wrapper carries (security F1 fail-closed). Observations: (1) dict-in-list aliasing via path-set is reachable (`set %d.x%` mutates the shared dict — language semantics or coverage gap, worth confirming); (2) HasSkipTag regex lacks regression tests; (3) standing lows on text.Convert default options + CopyStructure depth guard already filed by security.
